summary: Sprint 2 frontend testing: Boot sequence, Hot Chips, cursor, autoscroll. All 17 features verified via Playwright automation and visual screenshots.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 2 fully verified. Boot sequence: 4 lines with typewriter, input+chips disabled during boot. Hot chips: 3 colored buttons working. All commands functional. Purple [vX.X] tags render in log output. Blinking cursor present. App is fully working at the preview URL.
